text: I want to talk about your growth, your strengths, and the areas where you can {{c1::develop}} further.
explanation: A coaching conversation focuses on development, not blame, and helps someone improve over time.
usage:
Pattern: develop further / growth conversation
  • We scheduled a growth conversation this Friday.
  • I want to help you develop further in this role.
spanish: Quiero hablar sobre tu crecimiento, tus fortalezas y las áreas en las que puedes desarrollarte aún más.

text: I am here to {{c1::support}} you, but I also need you to be accountable for the outcomes.
explanation: Support and accountability go together in effective leadership. The leader helps, but the person must still own the work.
usage:
Pattern: support and accountability
  • We provide support and accountability at the same time.
  • Accountability is essential in leadership.
spanish: Estoy aquí para apoyarte, pero también necesito que seas responsable de los resultados.

text: To avoid confusion, we need to make our {{c1::expectations}} explicit and measurable.
explanation: Clear expectations reduce ambiguity and help people understand what success looks like.
usage:
Pattern: clear expectations / measurable expectations
  • We set clear expectations for the release.
  • Our expectations are measurable and time-bound.
spanish: Para evitar confusión, necesitamos dejar nuestras expectativas explícitas y medibles.

text: Let's create an {{c1::action plan}} with milestones and follow-up dates.
explanation: An action plan is a structured set of steps to address a gap or improve performance.
usage:
Pattern: action plan / milestones
  • We created an action plan for the onboarding process.
  • The milestones are due at the end of each month.
spanish: Creemos un plan de acción con hitos y fechas de seguimiento.

text: We need a consistent {{c1::feedback loop}} so people can adjust early instead of late.
explanation: A feedback loop is a recurring process of giving and receiving feedback to improve performance.
usage:
Pattern: feedback loop / regular feedback
  • We implemented a weekly feedback loop.
  • Regular feedback helps people mature faster.
spanish: Necesitamos un ciclo de retroalimentación consistente para que las personas puedan ajustarse temprano en lugar de tarde.
